name: Lake Kiowa Lodge
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Kiowa Lodge in Gainesville, TX! There are 4 courts. 3 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: North Central Texas College
description: North Central Texas College is a place to play pickleball in Gainesville, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
